purpose.question: Can the 28 oral typed-core vowel candidates be exercised on deterministic, previously unrendered real-G2P words and sentence frames before an acoustic confirmation run?
purpose.boundary: Fixture selection is structural and gate-based only. It makes no audio, acoustic, naturalness, listener, arbitrary-sentence, or product-support claim.

scope.excluded: Every nasal candidate and every automatic failure remains outside this manifest.

selection.inventory: Pinned wordfreq-large inventory in descending frequency order after canonicalization and deduplication.
selection.surface_filter: One lowercase alphabetic source word of 3-14 characters, excluding frozen frame words and the old synthetic mora/tavi/nelo words.
selection.phone_filter: The real source adapter must find exactly one occurrence of the selected changed vowel rule and no other changed vowel rule; every eligible voice for that profile/rule must agree.
selection.frame_control: Every frozen frame word has zero changed-vowel occurrences under both source voices. Each selected source word is distinct across the three contexts for a rule.
selection.cross_voice_control: When both voices are eligible for a rule, select one shared text before voice-specific rendering; every voice must pass the same real-G2P planner contract.
selection.planner_contract: Exactly the selected rule is changed; expected target indexes and occurrence counts match; consonant, insertion, and prosody changes are absent; comparison, nonce, supplemental-phone, model, punctuation, and repeated-word gates all pass.
selection.selection_rule: For each rule and context in frozen order, select the first unused prequalified word whose complete sentence passes the planner contract for every eligible voice. Log every rejection reason.

claim_limits.unseen: Previously unrendered and lexically distinct from the injected-phone carrier fixtures; not statistically representative of all words or sentences.
claim_limits.real_g2p: The actual pinned source adapters analyze every selected sentence; the profile is still rule-isolated for acoustic attribution.
claim_limits.audio: No renderer, anchor, candidate, or listening result exists at manifest time.
claim_limits.product: No voice, rule, route, flag, or deployment is enabled by fixture selection.

stopping_rule.instruction: Select all 84 slots once, write the immutable manifest, and stop before acoustic rendering.
